source: Claude External Audit — replace GitHub Issues with inbox.jsonl

tasks.title: Replace GitHub Issues with inbox.jsonl in deno_webhook.js Telegram handler
tasks.audit_note: Issue #31 had 2500 comment limit. Issue #32 is temporary fix. Real fix: Telegram messages append to governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl instead of GitHub issue comments. No more limits.
tasks.proof_required: governance/deno_webhook.js содержит inbox.jsonl AND не содержит curatorComment в Telegram handler
tasks.criteria: Telegram POST handler appends JSONL to governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl using updateFileContents and no longer calls postGitHubComment for operator messages

tasks.title: Test Telegram inbox receipt after Deno deploy
tasks.criteria: Operator sends Telegram message; bot responds inbox success; governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl contains appended JSON line
